basic_details.job_title: Telangana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 79 Anganwadi Helper / Ayah Posts in Yadadri Bhuvanagiri District
basic_details.organization_name: Women, Child, Disabled & Senior Citizens Welfare Department, Yadadri Bhuvanagiri District, Govt. of Telangana
basic_details.short_information: The District Welfare Officer, Women, Child, Disabled & Senior Citizens Welfare Department, Yadadri Bhuvanagiri District has released Notification No. 195/A/2017, dated 21.07.2026, inviting online applications from eligible women candidates for 79 vacant posts of Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) and Anganwadi Helper/Aaya (AWH) under four ICDS Projects - Aleru, Bhuvanagiri, Mothkur, and Ramannapet. Anganwadi Helper posts are open only in Scheduled Tribe (ST) tanda habitations. Online applications can be submitted from 22.07.2026 to 31.07.2026 (up to 5:00 PM).

age_limit.details: The age limit for Anganwadi Ayah recruitment 2026 is between 18 and 35 years. Age relaxation rules for reserved categories, if applicable, are not specified in the notification; candidates are advised to confirm this with the concerned ICDS Project Office.

qualification.details: Candidates applying for the Anganwadi Helper (Ayah) post must have passed Intermediate (10+2) from a recognized board.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Anganwadi Helper/Aaya (AWH) - ST tanda posts only

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Anganwadi Helper/Aaya (AWH) - ST tanda posts only

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Anganwadi Helper/Aaya (AWH) - ST tanda posts only

how_to_apply: Locate the AWC ID relevant to your area from the vacancy list above.
Complete the online application as guided on the portal between 22.07.2026 and 31.07.2026 (5:00 PM).
The notification does not give further step-by-step instructions for the application form; the exact process is available on the official website.
important_instructions: Only online applications will be accepted; the notification does not mention any offline mode. Anganwadi Helper posts are being filled only in ST tanda habitations. The District Collector/Chairperson, Yadadri Bhuvanagiri has full authority to cancel or amend this notification. The notification will also be published in a local daily newspaper on 22.07.2026.

rows.details: Women, Child, Disabled & Senior Citizens Welfare Department, Yadadri Bhuvanagiri District, Govt. of Telangana

content_sections.heading: Yadadri Bhuvanagiri Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: The notification does not mention separate dates for merit list release, document verification, or final selection. Candidates should check mis.tgwdcw.nic.in regularly for further updates.

content_sections.heading: Yadadri Bhuvanagiri Anganwadi Vacancy 2026: Project-Wise Breakup
content_sections.text: The 79 vacancies are distributed across four ICDS Projects as follows. Note: the project called "Bhuvanagiri" in the notification's summary table appears as "Bhongir" in the detailed AWC-wise vacancy list - the vacancy counts for this project match exactly across both documents, confirming they refer to the same project. Category labels are reproduced exactly as shown in the official AWC-wise vacancy list. VH, Ex-S, and (W) appear to denote horizontal reservations (Visually Handicapped, Ex-Serviceman, and Women, respectively); candidates should confirm the exact meaning on the official portal before applying. All 24 AWH vacancies are reserved for ST candidates from tanda (hamlet) habitations, consistent with the notification's statement that Helper posts are being filled only in ST tandas.

content_sections.heading: Yadadri Bhuvanagiri Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: AWC-Wise Vacancy List
content_sections.text: The table below lists all 79 Anganwadi Centres (AWCs) with vacancies, exactly as given in the official annexure, so candidates can locate the AWC relevant to their own village/ward. All application windows across all 79 AWCs run from 22.07.2026 to 31.07.2026, as stated in the annexure.

tables.caption: Bhuvanagiri / Bhongir Project (3 AWT + 13 AWH posts)

content_sections.heading: Yadadri Bhuvanagiri Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: This notification does not specify educational qualification, age limit, or other eligibility conditions - it directs candidates to the official website for full details. Based on the general norms commonly applied under Telangana's Anganwadi (Saksham Anganwadi & Poshan 2.0) recruitment guidelines across districts, the following criteria are typically expected. Candidates must independently verify these on mis.tgwdcw.nic.in before applying, as this specific notification does not confirm them. Only women candidates are eligible to apply, as stated in this notification. Candidates are generally required to be local residents of the Gram Panchayat (rural) or ward (urban) where the Anganwadi Centre is located; for AWH posts, of the same tanda/hamlet. Educational qualification for AWT is typically SSC (10th Class) or Intermediate (12th Class); for AWH it is typically 8th or 10th Class - not confirmed by this notification. Age limit under the general Telangana Anganwadi norms is typically around 18–35 years - not confirmed by this notification.

content_sections.heading: Yadadri Bhuvanagiri Anganwadi Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for the Anganwadi Helper (Ayah) post must have passed Intermediate (10+2) from a recognized board.

content_sections.heading: Yadadri Bhuvanagiri Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: The age limit for Anganwadi Ayah recruitment 2026 is between 18 and 35 years. Age relaxation rules for reserved categories, if applicable, are not specified in the notification; candidates are advised to confirm this with the concerned ICDS Project Office.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for Yadadri Bhuvanagiri Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Not specified in this notification. Candidates are advised to keep educational certificates, residence proof, caste certificate (if applicable), and identity proof ready, as these are commonly required for online Anganwadi applications in Telangana, though not stated in this specific notification.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Online for Yadadri Bhuvanagiri Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Visit the official website: mis.tgwdcw.nic.in . Locate the AWC ID relevant to your area from the vacancy list above. Complete the online application as guided on the portal between 22.07.2026 and 31.07.2026 (5:00 PM). The notification does not give further step-by-step instructions for the application form; the exact process is available on the official website.

content_sections.heading: Yadadri Bhuvanagiri Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only online applications will be accepted; the notification does not mention any offline mode. Anganwadi Helper posts are being filled only in ST tanda habitations. The District Collector/Chairperson, Yadadri Bhuvanagiri has full authority to cancel or amend this notification. The notification will also be published in a local daily newspaper on 22.07.2026.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in the Yadadri Bhuvanagiri Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 79 vacancies in total - 55 Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) and 24 Anganwadi Helper (AWH) posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Yadadri Bhuvanagiri Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online is 31.07.2026, up to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q3. When did the online application process start?
Q4. Which ICDS projects are covered in this recruitment?
faq.answer: Aleru, Bhuvanagiri, Mothkur, and Ramannapet ICDS Projects.

faq.question: Q5. Are Anganwadi Helper posts open to all candidates?
faq.answer: No, Anganwadi Helper (AWH) vacancies in this notification are open only in ST tanda habitations.

faq.question: Q6. Which project has the highest number of vacancies?
faq.answer: Mothkur has the highest total, with 31 AWT vacancies and no AWH vacancies.

faq.question: Q7. Can male candidates apply for these posts?
faq.answer: No, the notification states applications are invited from eligible women candidates only.
